nodes.label: Regression tests for Google Workspace OAuth setup.  These tests cover the headle
Callback URL carries space-delimited scope list; Flow must receive it (not full
Partial scopes are accepted with a warning (gws migration: v2.0).
Tests for _mangaba_home.py fallback when mangaba_constants is unavailable.
When mangaba_constants is missing, MANGABA_HOME comes from env var.
When mangaba_constants is missing and MANGABA_HOME unset, default to ~/.mangaba.
Empty/whitespace MANGABA_HOME is treated as unset.
Fallback display_mangaba_home() uses ~/ shorthand like the real one.
Fallback display_mangaba_home() handles profile paths under ~/.
Fallback display_mangaba_home() returns full path for non-home locations.
When mangaba_constants IS importable, _mangaba_home delegates to it.
